heading: Jurisdiction over portion of Constitution Avenue
label: 8122 Jurisdiction over portion of Constitution Avenue
text: The Director of the National Park Service has jurisdiction over that part of Constitution Avenue west of Virginia Avenue that was under the control of the Commissioners of the District of Columbia prior to .May 27, 1908
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)812240:64.(1st complete par. on p. 356), .May 27, 1908, ch. 200, § 135 Stat. 356For transfer of functions from the Chief of Engineers to the Director of the National Park Service, see the revision note under . The words “Constitution Avenue” are substituted for “B Street” to reflect the current name.section 8102 of this title
